title: The Great Floorboard Caper
tagline: A long way down, a long way home.
synopsis: A brave yellow peg-man attempts to cross the treacherous carpet shag and climb the mountainous toy box edge after being accidentally swept under the sofa. He must avoid the dreaded vacuum cleaner nozzle to reunite with his family in the safety of the plastic farm.
fun_fact: The stunt-double for the yellow peg-man had to be glued to the set floor for the dramatic chase scene because he kept tipping over when the set vibrated.

title: Love in the Plug-Hole
tagline: Separated by three inches of moulded plastic.
synopsis: Two peg-people fall in love while stationed in the driver's seats of two separate plastic school buses that are permanently locked together by a plastic hitch. They spend the entire film trying to lean their rigid bodies far enough to touch, but their lack of arms and fixed peg bases keep their passion eternally distant.
fun_fact: The two lead actors were forbidden from meeting off-set to preserve the tension of their unbridgeable gap on screen.

title: The Missing Peg
